---
title: "Home"
---

# About Me

Hi, I’m Ahmed — a Bioinformatics PhD student at the University of Michigan working on single-cell and spatial sequencing data in pancreatic cancer.

## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=XXXXX)
- [Twitter](https://twitter.com/yourhandle)
- [CV (PDF)](cv.pdf)
